instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall monitor internal RAM integrity.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect RAM error when memory checksum verification fails.

L4_requirements: IF RAM_Checksum_Status = Invalid THEN RAM_Error_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall monitor ROM integrity.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect ROM fault when ROM checksum validation fails.

L4_requirements: IF ROM_Checksum_Status = Invalid THEN ROM_Error_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall monitor CPU load.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when CPU load exceeds CPU_Load_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF CPU_Load > CPU_Load_Limit THEN CPU_Load_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall monitor watchdog operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect watchdog fault when watchdog reset occurs unexpectedly.

L4_requirements: IF Watchdog_Reset_Event = TRUE THEN Watchdog_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall detect internal task execution failure.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when internal software task misses execution deadline.

L4_requirements: IF Task_Execution_Time > Task_Deadline THEN Task_Execution_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall detect internal temperature faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when internal ECU temperature exceeds limit.

L4_requirements: IF ECU_Internal_Temp > ECU_Temp_Limit THEN ECU_Temperature_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall detect internal communication faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when internal module communication fails.

L4_requirements: IF Internal_Module_Communication = Failed THEN Internal_Comm_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall detect stack overflow errors.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect stack overflow during software execution.

L4_requirements: IF Stack_Usage > Stack_Limit THEN Stack_Overflow_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall maintain safe operation during internal faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate limp-home mode when critical internal faults occur.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall clear internal faults after system recovery.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear diagnostic fault when internal system checks pass.
